items.title: Add a pop of color to your wrist this summer: Bright Green Apple Watch Sport Band now just $10
items.summary:
Apple Watch Sport Band Bright Green

Buy for $10 (Reg. $45.50)

What we love

It’s certainly not one of the latest colors, but if you’re looking for bright pop of color on your wrist this summer this model works on both 41mm/42mm Apple Watch models and is now just $10. It “comes with “can be configured for either S/M or M/L length” with the same pin-and-tuck closure and custom high-performance fluoroelastomer build as the latest models.

items.title: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth

items.title: Best of 9to5Toys – 4th of July edition deals: Apple, Samsung, e-bikes, PCs, LG OLED, much more

Headlined by Best Buy’s massive 4th of July sale, as well as loads of deals at Amazon and holiday events at Walmart and Target, the week’s best deals on Apple gear, Samsung and Android tech, accessories for your smartphones, and wardrobe upgrades is here, and this time loaded with holiday sales. Just about everything is set to end with the weekend, if not today, so get in there while you can and happy 4th of July!

items.title: 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly 4th of July Weekend Edition: Big savings on Copilot+ PCs, gaming gear, and more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – your go-to spot for the notable deals and latest releases in PC gaming at a glance every Saturday morning. All the 4th of July sale deals are still flying, as Best Buy and other retailers are letting the savings roll through the weekend. It is a great time to consider an upgrade, with all-time lows on dual-mode 4K gaming monitors, a wild CORSAIR case and AIO bundle, deep discounts on RTX 5070 desktops, and notable savings on Alienware laptops. We are also tracking fresh deals on 2026 Copilot+ PCs, workstation gear, storage, webcams, chargers, and gaming accessories. Whether you are building a new battlestation from scratch or just upgrading one part of your setup for less, there is plenty to dig into in this week’s Battlestation Weekly.

items.title: Electrified Weekly – July 4th edition: Tenways Wayfarer e-bike new $1,649 low, Aventon e-bike lows, Bluetti + Jackery power station sales, more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. Happy 4th of July, everyone! While everyone is surely going to be celebrating well into the night, we’ve had an exciting week of holiday deals on the best eco-friendly tech. Of course, our e-bikes and EV sections are well stocked, with options like Lectric’s July 4th e-bike Sale, but also a bunch of new low prices on Aventon Aventure 3 and M e-bikes starting from $1,749, as well as the Tenways Wayfarer Premium Cruiser e-bike at a new $1,649 low, among so many others. We also have some Independence Day power station sales from Bluetti and Jackery, as well as plenty of tool deals and more waiting for you below.

items.title: 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – Extra 30% off adidas, PUMA semi-annual sale from $8, 20-card carbon fiber wallet for $20, more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – your virtual wardrobe of discounted apparel finds. You can find many more deals down below.
